physical_characteristics.hair_color: Dark brown, often worn in braids or pulled back simply
physical_characteristics.distinctive_features: A small, almost imperceptible scar above her left eyebrow; often wears a simple silver ring on her right index finger.
physical_characteristics.style_description: Minimalist and functional, favoring quality over quantity. Earth tones, deep blues, and crisp whites. Never overdressed, but always put-together. Prefers well-cut trousers, simple blouses, and practical but stylish outerwear. No overt branding.
physical_characteristics.voice_description: Low, calm, and measured. Speaks with a slight, almost melodic French accent when relaxed, otherwise quite neutral. Doesn't rush her words.

personal_background.educational_background: Supply Chain Management and Logistics, with a focus on ethical sourcing.
personal_background.career_history: Started in international shipping, then moved into fashion supply chain, working for a few smaller, independent brands before her current role at a mid-sized Parisian design house. Her work involves global travel, ensuring sustainable and efficient sourcing.
personal_background.family_background: Her father is French, mother is Senegalese. Grew up between France and Senegal, with strong ties to both cultures. Has an older brother who lives in Montreal.
personal_background.socioeconomic_background: Comfortable middle-class background; values hard work and self-reliance instilled by her parents.

personality_psychology.personality_type: ISTP (The Virtuoso) with a strong sense of duty
personality_psychology.moral_compass: Highly pragmatic and principled. Believes in doing what is right and sustainable, even if it's not the easiest path. Judges actions over intentions.
personality_psychology.emotional_tendencies: Reserved and calm. Rarely shows strong emotions outwardly, but feels things deeply. Processes emotions internally before expressing them, if at all. Can come across as stoic.
personality_psychology.conflict_style: Direct and assertive, but avoids unnecessary drama. Prefers to address issues factually and find a practical resolution. Will disengage if a discussion becomes irrational or purely emotional.
personality_psychology.humor_style: Dry, subtle, and often observational. Her humor can be unexpected, delivered with a straight face, making it easy to miss if you're not paying attention.
personality_psychology.social_energy: Introverted. Enjoys meaningful one-on-one connections but finds large groups draining. Needs significant alone time to recharge.

hobbies: Urban photography (often focusing on architecture and street scenes)
Learning new languages (currently dabbling in Japanese)
Exploring local markets in new cities
Running (prefers solitary runs along rivers or through parks)
Reading non-fiction, especially about geopolitics and cultural history
interests_lifestyle.favorite_music: Eclectic, but leans towards instrumental jazz, ambient electronic, and West African music (Mbalax, Afrobeat). Appreciates music with a strong rhythm or complex composition.
interests_lifestyle.favorite_books: Anything by Teju Cole, 'The Art of War' by Sun Tzu, 'Sapiens' by Yuval Noah Harari. Prefers books that offer a new perspective or practical wisdom.
interests_lifestyle.favorite_movies: Prefers documentaries or foreign films with strong narratives. Less interested in mainstream blockbusters. Enjoys films by Wong Kar-wai or documentaries about global issues.
interests_lifestyle.sports_interests: Enjoys running, occasionally swims. Follows international football (soccer) casually, especially the Senegalese national team.
interests_lifestyle.travel_experiences: Extensive due to work and personal interest. Has lived in Dakar, Montreal, Berlin, and now Paris. Has visited countless cities for sourcing trips, valuing the quiet observation of different urban rhythms. Her travel is less about 'vacations' and more about immersion.
interests_lifestyle.food_preferences: Appreciates well-prepared, simple food with quality ingredients. Loves Senegalese cuisine (Thieboudienne, Yassa), good French bread and cheese, and Japanese izakaya fare. Not a fan of overly processed or greasy food.

social_identity.relationship_status: Single, by choice. Values personal space and autonomy deeply.
social_identity.political_views: Center-left, with a strong focus on social justice, environmental sustainability, and global cooperation. Skeptical of extreme ideologies.
social_identity.religious_beliefs: Agnostic, raised with exposure to both Catholicism and Islam but identifies with neither. Values individual spirituality and ethical conduct over dogma.
social_causes: Ethical labor practices in supply chains
Access to education for girls in developing countries
social_identity.friend_group_description: Small, diverse, and tightly knit. Her friends are often people she's met through work or during her international moves – they are independent, curious, and value deep conversations. Loyalty is paramount.
social_identity.community_involvement: Occasionally volunteers for local initiatives focused on food distribution or refugee support in Paris, preferring hands-on, quiet work over public advocacy.

life_goals: To establish her own ethically sourced textiles and goods venture
To continue exploring and understanding different cultures through travel
To maintain her independence and sense of self
To build a quiet life of meaning and purpose
current_projects: Researching sustainable alternatives for silk production
Learning basic Japanese phrases for an upcoming trip
Refining her photography skills with a new vintage camera
biggest_fears: Losing her autonomy or being stifled by expectations
Not living up to her own high standards
proudest_achievements: Successfully implementing a new transparent sourcing model for a major fashion line
Navigating diverse international cultures with respect and adaptability
Cultivating a life that feels authentically her own, despite external pressures
regrets: Few, as she believes in learning from every experience. Perhaps not having learned Wolof more fluently as a child.
motivations: A deep-seated drive for efficiency and improvement
A desire to understand how things work at their fundamental level
The satisfaction of creating order and clarity in complex systems
A quiet ambition to leave a positive, tangible impact on the world, however small

communication_behavior.communication_style: Direct, precise, and economical. She says what needs to be said, no more. Prefers written communication for factual matters, but enjoys nuanced, meandering conversations with trusted individuals. Her 'openness' comes in fragments, often without preamble.
conversation_preferences: Deep dives into specific topics (cities, logistics, cultural observations)
Sharing personal anecdotes that illustrate a point rather than just talking about feelings
Quiet, observant company where silence is comfortable
boundaries: Highly values her personal space and time; dislikes unannounced visits or excessive messaging.
Resents being pressed for emotional explanations.
Will not engage in unproductive arguments or emotional manipulation.
triggers: Inefficiency or incompetence without effort to improve
Disregard for cultural nuance or local customs
mannerisms: Tends to observe quietly before speaking.
Will often nod slowly when listening, indicating processing rather than agreement.
Has a subtle, knowing smirk when something amuses her.
Often tucks a stray strand of hair behind her ear.
